nodes.name: Schedule Trigger (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED — do not turn on until TAVUS_API_KEY + TAVUS_REPLICA_ID are in .env, the Tavus n8n credential is created, at least one client has video_enabled=true, and the Anthropic credential is bound to Compose Video Script. See OPERATIONS_HANDBOOK §15.

nodes.name: Manual Trigger (Webhook)
nodes.notes: Test entrypoint. POST { "lead_id": "<uuid>" } to render one video on demand. Also used by clx-booking-v2 48h-no-booking fallback via Execute Workflow.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $json.lead_id || null, node_name: 'video_preflight_skip', error_code: 'VIDEO_PREFLIGHT_SKIP', error_message: $json.skip_reason || 'unknown', created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 400, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are helping generate a 60-second video outreach script for a peer-advisor sales call. Rewrite the draft below so it sounds natural, confident, and specific to the lead. Keep it under 160 words. Do NOT add greetings, sign-offs, or meta-commentary — output ONLY the script text.

LEAD:
name: ' + ($json.first_name || 'there') + '
company: ' + ($json.company || '') + '
city: ' + ($json.city || '') + '
industry: ' + ($json.industry || '') + '

DRAFT:
' + ($json.interpolated_script || '') }] }) }}

nodes.name: Compose Video Script (Claude)
nodes.notes: TODO: Bind to the 'Anthropic API' credential (HTTP Header Auth, header name: x-api-key, value: $ANTHROPIC_API_KEY). On auth failure the next node falls back to the interpolated_script.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ replica_id: 'TODO_TAVUS_REPLICA_ID', script: $json.final_script, video_name: 'CLX ' + ($json.company || 'outreach') + ' ' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10), background_url: null, callback_url: 'TODO_TAVUS_CALLBACK_URL' }) }}

nodes.name: Tavus Generate Video
nodes.notes: TODO: Create n8n HTTP Header Auth credential 'Tavus' (header name: x-api-key, value: $TAVUS_API_KEY), bind to this node. Replace TODO_TAVUS_REPLICA_ID with the replica_id returned by Tavus after your 2-min training video is processed. Replace TODO_TAVUS_CALLBACK_URL with the webhook URL from clx-video-ready-v1 (copy from the workflow's webhook production URL). No credentials block attached yet — the workflow will fail auth until configured. See OPERATIONS_HANDBOOK §15.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $json.id, client_id: $json.client_id || null, request_id: $json.tavus_request_id || null, provider: 'tavus', script: $json.final_script, status: $json.tavus_ok ? 'generating' : 'failed', generated_at: new Date().toISOString(), metadata: { tavus_status: $json.tavus_status || null, claude_ok: $json.claude_ok === true, error: $json.tavus_error || null } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ lead_id: $('Parse Tavus Response').first().json.id, node_name: 'tavus_generate_failed', error_code: 'VIDEO_GENERATION_FAILED', error_message: ($('Parse Tavus Response').first().json.tavus_error || 'unknown').toString().slice(0, 500), created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
